start.text: Ah, a visitor. The library has been expecting you. Tell me, do you seek knowledge, or does knowledge seek you?

choices.text: I'm looking for answers about Springtown's past.
This place is amazing! What's in here?

history.text: Springtown's past... *traces a finger along a dusty spine* Every cherry blossom planted here was a promise. The first settlers made a pact with the spirits of this valley.

choices.text: That sounds like a fairy tale.

wonder.text: *smiles enigmatically* Everything that ever was, and everything that could be. These books are not merely written - they dream themselves into existence. Would you like to read one?

choices.text: Yes, please show me something special!

casual.text: *raises an eyebrow* No one 'just passes by' the Great Library. The path here only appears to those who need it most. But I will not press you.

choices.text: You're right, I actually am curious.

pact.text: In exchange for eternal spring, the spirits asked only that the townspeople never forget to appreciate beauty. A simple price, yet one many struggle to pay in their busy lives.

choices.text: That's beautiful. I want to learn more.
Do you keep the pact alive?

skeptical.text: *chuckles softly* Fairy tales are truths wearing masks. But skepticism has its own wisdom. Come back when you are ready to see what lies beneath.

choices.text: I'm sorry, I didn't mean to be rude.

special_book.text: *pulls a glowing tome from the shelf* This one tells the story of a traveler who found a town where it was always spring. *winks* Sound familiar?

dream_books.text: Every story ever imagined leaves a trace in the world. The library collects those traces. Here, even your thoughts might become a book someday.

yuki_role.text: I am its guardian. *places hand on heart* I remind the books that they matter. And occasionally, I remind visitors too.

choices.text: Thank you, Yuki. I'll come back often.

forgive.text: No offense taken. Doubt is the first step toward understanding. Return whenever you wish - the library always has room for curious minds.

end_curious.text: The library will be here when you are ready. *turns back to her books, humming an ancient melody*

end_mystery.text: *smiles mysteriously* All the best stories are about the reader. Until next time, traveler.

end_friendship.text: *a genuine warmth enters her voice* I would like that. The books have much to tell you - and so do I.
